completion: cargo test passes, strict filter types exist, SQL query builder works, API accepts filters, MCP tools expose filtering

iterations.description: Core types, SQL builder, and database indexes
API endpoint integration and MCP tools

iterations.notes: Fixed database enum casting issues for pmest_facet, tag_status, and skos_label_type columns. Added unique suffixes to test data to prevent duplicate key violations.

learnings: PostgreSQL enum columns require explicit casting (::enum_type) when binding string values from Rust
Integration tests that create database records need unique identifiers to avoid duplicate key violations on repeated runs
The create_concept and add_label functions in skos_tags.rs were missing enum casts for facet_type, status, and label_type columns
